title: 5 x 13A Plug Top Fuses BS1362 | 13 Amp Household Ceramic Cartridge Tube Fuse 240V/250V 6.3x25mm for UK Mains Electrical Appliances
features: Designed for use in standard UK 3-pin mains plugs. Ideal for appliances requiring a 13A rating.
Choose from 5, 10, 15, or 25 fuses depending on your household or commercial needs.
CE Compliant: Meets European safety standards for trusted plug fuse performance.
Ceramic tube body provides durable and heat-resistant performance for everyday use.
Use in kettles, microwaves, heaters, extension leads, washing machines, and more.
Easily replace blown fuses by opening the plug, inserting the new fuse, and reassembling.
description: Product Description Premium 13A Plug Top Fuses – BS1362 Compliant for Safe UK Power Use These 13A ceramic fuses are designed to protect your high-powered appliances and meet BS1362 safety standards. Ideal for UK 3-pin plug tops, each fuse features a durable ceramic body and a clear red "13A" marking. Suitable for kettles, heaters, microwaves, extension leads, and more. Available in value packs of 5, 10, 15, and 25. Built for Reliability – Tested, Sized, and Rated for UK Plug Safety Each 13A fuse is crafted with a high-integrity ceramic tube and copper-plated end caps to withstand high temperatures and overcurrent situations. Sized at 6.3mm × 25mm and rated for 240V–250V, they fit all standard BS1362 UK plugs. Every fuse is batch-tested for consistent performance and clear 13A identification ensures quick replacement.
